Candy Boom: [{'Candy Boom': 'Packages of chewy, fruit-flavored jelly candies branded as "Boom Jelly Jp!", featuring brightly colored, glossy plastic bags with a playful design. The packaging prominently displays the brand name in a bold, stylized font alongside a cartoon white dog or puppy character. The bags are transparent, revealing small, translucent, gelatinous candies inside, and are consistently found on store shelves alongside other confectionery items, designed to be visually appealing and targeted toward consumers seeking chewy, fruity treats. The product is specifically identifiable by its distinct "Boom Jelly Jp!" branding and the white cartoon dog mascot, which differentiates it from other snack items with similar packaging or branding elements, such as bags of chips or other savory snacks that may share similar color schemes or shapes but lack the specific branding and mascot.'}]
Chocopie Dark: ['{\'Chocopie Dark\': \'Rectangular cardboard boxes of a specific brand of chocolate-flavored sandwich cookies, identifiable by the prominent "ORION" brand name in white or light-colored lettering at the top, the large stylized "ChocoPie" product name in red or white, and a clear image of the round, chocolate-coated wafer cookie with cream filling on the front. The packaging is consistently vibrant red with white or yellow accents and includes the word "Dark" to denote the flavor variant, distinguishing it from other snack items and cookie products that lack these specific visual and branding elements. The product name "ChocoPie" must be fully legible and styled in the brand\'s signature font, and the "Dark" variant designation must be clearly visible and positioned near the product name or flavor description. Additionally, the packaging must feature a distinct visual motif of a chocolate-coated wafer cookie with cream filling, and the overall design must be consistent with the established branding of the ChocoPie product line, excluding any items with different product names, branding, or visual themes such as "Marine" or other unrelated snack items. The packaging must also be clearly distinguishable from other snack items like potato chips or other cookie brands that may share similar color schemes or packaging styles but lack the specific ChocoPie branding, product name, and visual motif, particularly those featuring bold, stylized text like "MAX" or "Swing" on a dark background, which are characteristic of entirely different snack categories.\'}']
Chocopie Nor: Chocopie Nor has a distinctive red packaging, prominently displaying “Chocopie” and typically featuring a snack image.
Marine Boy: Marine Boy packaging typically has a playful ocean theme, featuring nautical characters and bold marine graphics on the package.
OStar Red: O’Star Red packages are identified by their red packaging with bold “O’Star” branding. The pack often features imagery of chips.
OStar Yellow: [{'OStar Yellow': 'Packaged potato chip products featuring a bold, stylized "OStar" logo prominently displayed within a yellow star emblem on the front of flexible plastic bags, with the Vietnamese phrase "TỰ NHIÊN" printed directly below the logo. The packaging is uniformly rectangular and arranged in neat rows on retail shelves, clearly distinguishing it from other snack items such as chocolate-filled cakes or cookies with different branding, logo styles, or packaging shapes. Additionally, the product must be presented in a consistent yellow color scheme with the star emblem and the specific "TỰ NHIÊN" text, differentiating it from similar-looking products with different color palettes or branding elements like "MAX" or "Swing", and specifically excluding any variant that features a red background or prominent red branding elements around the logo or star emblem, or any variant that includes the word "Premium" as part of the main branding text on the front panel.'}]
Swing Maxx: [{'Swing Maxx': 'Snack packaging distinguished by a large, stylized, white letter "X" as its primary and defining visual mark, positioned centrally and serving as the sole brand identifier. The "X" is rendered in high contrast against a dark background, with accompanying text elements including "Swing" and "MAX" in bold, high-contrast typography. The design is characterized by its bold, graphic simplicity and lack of additional imagery or branding elements beyond this core logo. No other product shares this exact visual signature, making the "X" the exclusive and sufficient identifier for classification.'}]
Swing Nor: [{'Swing Nor': 'A snack food packaged in a rectangular bag with a bold, stylized logo in a curved font, featuring a bright red or orange background with contrasting green or yellow accents, and imagery of the fried or seasoned snack item, consistently found in retail settings on shelves alongside other snack brands, distinguished by its unique shape and color scheme that sets it apart from surrounding products, and is not confused with products that have a different brand name, logo style, or packaging shape, such as those with a cartoon character or a different color palette like the green and yellow "Boom" product or the red and white "Choco Pie" product.'}]
